title: hemionitis myrtillifolia
intro: Hemionitis myrtillifolia, also known as the eastern oyster fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Hemionitis myrtillifolia can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
